title: Gnaw Choc Shot Hot Chocolate Gift Set, Luxurious & Rich Hot Chocolate Gifts For Any Occasion,3 Classic & Moreish Flavours Included In All Hot Chocolate Sets, Milk Hot Choc, Caramel & Fudgy Rocky Road
features: THREE CLASSIC FLAVOURS: Enjoy three of our most popular hot choc stirrers: classic milk hot chocolate, velvety sweet caramel & the fudgy delight of Rocky Road
LUXURIOUS, HANDMADE CHOCOLATE: GNAW creates only the finest, luxurious chocolate, enjoy the tastiest hot chocolate drink with smooth handmade chocolate used to create each stirrer
STIR & SIP: transform your chosen stirrer into a mug of hot choc by simply popping the stirrer into a cup of hot milk, stirring & topping with fluffy marshmallows
PALM OIL FREE: We care about our ingredients; you’ll find no palm oil in our hot choc shots as we care about our planet & making sustainable choices too
RECYCLABLE PACKAGING: Our planet-friendliness doesn’t stop at the ingredients, we wrap each gift set in high-quality, recyclable packaging, using 70% less plastic too
description: Product description Treat yourself by melting and swirling a gorgeously delicious chunk of handcrafted chocolate into hot milk, top with mini marshmallows, then sit down relax and enjoy....happy days :) For a real treat with some delicious flavours, be sure to try all-our new Mixed Hot Chocolate Bombs too! Mug NOT included. Ingredients Sugar cocoa butter whole milk powder cocoa pulp marshmallows (Glucose fructose syrup, sugar, water, gelatin, corn starch, natural color (beet), natural flavor) fud (sugar, sweetened condensed milk (milk, sugar), glucose syrup, salted butter mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, moisture ant glycerin, spring taste d, salt) foamed milk powder caramel powder (frothed milk powder, whey powder (milk), sugar, butter (milk)) emulsifiers (soy lecithin, sunflower lecithin) Directions Treat yourself by melting and swirling a gorgeously delicious chunk of handcrafted chocolate into hot milk, top with mini marshmallows, then sit down relax and enjoy.
